creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Close. Nikolay Denev's sge(4) which is based on submitter's driver 
committed to HEAD and MFC to both stable/8 and stable/7 completed. 
sge(4) should support both SiS190 Fast ethernet and 
SiS191 Fast/Gigabit ethernet with additional offloading 
capabilities.
